summary: Remove the post-overrides User-Agent assignment that pinned the request to myfitnesspal-pp-cli/0.1.0.
reason: Surf's Impersonate().Chrome() sets the right Chrome User-Agent at the TLS layer; the subsequent req.Header.Set('User-Agent', 'myfitnesspal-pp-cli/0.1.0') was overwriting it and re-triggering bot detection on every request that went through the shared client.
